name: Heritage Hills Pickleball Courts
description:
Please remove our facility from your site.
It is in a residents only development and we have had a rash of outside interlopers attempting to play .
This taxes our security staff as well as having safety implications as we have had people go on the courts in insufficient footwear as well as having minors playing on the courts .
